---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. What use case is not currently supported?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you would like to see. How should it work?

## Module / Cloud Affected

Which module or cloud provider does this feature relate to?

- [ ] modules/aws/network
- [ ] modules/aws/compute
- [ ] modules/aws/security
- [ ] modules/aws/monitoring
- [ ] modules/aws/dns
- [ ] modules/azure/network
- [ ] modules/azure/compute
- [ ] modules/azure/security
- [ ] modules/azure/monitoring
- [ ] modules/azure/dns
- [ ] modules/gcp/network
- [ ] modules/gcp/compute
- [ ] modules/gcp/security
- [ ] modules/gcp/monitoring
- [ ] modules/gcp/dns
- [ ] modules/cross-cloud/vpn
- [ ] modules/cross-cloud/logging
- [ ] New module (please describe)
- [ ] Cross-cutting / Infrastructure

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered. Why were they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, references, or examples about the feature request here.
